# Portfolio OS 2026 - LLMs Overview

Welcome to Portfolio OS 2026 by Soham Kundu! This is a Windows 11-inspired interactive portfolio designed for both humans and AI agents.

## Quick Links
- [Main Website](https://portfolio-os-2026.vercel.app/)
- [Sitemap](https://portfolio-os-2026.vercel.app/sitemap.xml)

## Technical Architecture
- React / Vite
- Zustand State Management
- Framer Motion
- Web Workers for AI services
